implementation.primarySubject: feat(world): 建立内容地点静谧窗景
implementation.finalFixSubject: fix(world): 增强内容地点静态空间骨架
implementation.animatedScope: Node room window, distant island and dust only; reading DOM remains static

reading.mode: 720 CSS px viewport as 200 percent desktop reflow equivalent

visualReview.normal: The cinematic room remains primary; the added window and dust layer is low contrast and does not invade the desk or reading action.
visualReview.backgroundHidden: An arched wall boundary, columns, floor, desk silhouette, window, distant island, relation doors, reading door and exits remain spatially distinguishable.

failuresAndCorrections: The first browser selector matched both the room reading door and the accessible fallback link; a data-room-object compound selector fixed strict mode.
The second probe requested build identity from a closed page context; the final run uses an independent request context before browser teardown.
The first background-hidden image still looked like floating labels; DOM room wall, floor and desk geometry were added and fresh evidence regenerated.
claimBoundary: C.7 proves one representative Node room and reading reflow, not every content shape or a full accessibility audit.
Ten-minute resource stability, long recordings and route cleanup remain C.10-C.13.
